---
title: "Contact Information"
---

Below is my contact information. Please feel free to reach out to me with any questions, opportunities, or collaborations.

**Email:** [jessicabenun@yahoo.com](mailto:jessicabenun@yahoo.com)

**LinkedIn:** [www.linkedin.com/in/jessica-benun](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jessica-benun)

**Phone Number:** [401-318-6307](tel:4013186307)
